subcodes.first_line: O Manuchehr, Manuchehr possessed of celestial grace and fairest countenance, adorned with crown and diadem lofty as the moon and sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منوچهر منوچهر مینو و بانوی پریچهر داشت و افسر و دیهیم بلند چون ماه و مهر
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the ephemeral and the eternal
